{{Quote|Lunkar will seize any opportunity granted to obtain his rematch. But if he gets in our way, it won't be a rematch he should be vying for: it should be a one-way travel voucher to the Unknown Regions. If I ever catch him, he'll be in no condition to face the Survival Zones when I'm through with him.|Lt. [[Ma'w'shiye]]|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Lunkar An''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rellarin]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] and a veteran of the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]]. Powerfully-built, An was noticeable because of his thick dark brown skin, his small black eyes and his oversized hands.

==Biography==
As a member of the [[Summit Class]], An was successful in the final trek used as a test in the GOSS. He did the trek in 129.1 hours, holding a new record. Proud of his own success, he left GOSS to create his own [[Jmin Survival Academy]], of which he was an instructor.

Seven years later, his record was broken by the [[Twilight Class]], by more than one day. An discovered this fact and returned to GOSS as a student, wanting to "redeem" himself.

An has since been a personal nemesis of Twilight Class veteran [[Sisquoc]], and has also expressed a personal hatred towards another Twilight veteran [[Ma'w'shiye]]. Particularly with Ma'w'shiye, An has had many fights and personal encounters.
